question: What can be concluded about the average number of website visits for the entire week shown?

options.A: The weekly average is about 35 visits, found by averaging the visible bars over all seven days.
options.B: The weekly average is about 38 visits, based only on the days with non-zero bars.
options.C: It is not appropriate to calculate an average for the entire week because some days have no recorded visits data.
options.D: The weekly average is exactly 20 visits, because the dashed line shows the true mean.

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
